title: Heatwave Returns to Western Odisha, Balangir Crosses 40°C | Kanak News Shorts - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
After a few days of Kalbaisakhi rain relief, intense heat has once again returned to Western Odisha. Balangir district is witnessing temperatures above 40 degrees Celsius, making life extremely difficult for residents.
People are struggling to step outside during the day due to scorching sunlight, while humid nights are making it hard to stay indoors. Locals have also raised concerns over large-scale tree cutting in urban areas, reducing green cover and worsening the heat conditions.
With summer still continuing, residents fear how they will cope with another month of extreme weather. Watch the full report for ground visuals and public reactions from Balangir.
